introSection: Gulf Coaster was an Allan Herschell Company kiddie roller coaster located at Marriott's Great America in Gurnee, Illinois, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The Gulf Coaster opened in 1976, along with a similar coaster at California's Great America (at the time both parks were owned by the Marriott company).

fullText:
Gulf Coaster was an Allan Herschell Company kiddie roller coaster located at Marriott's Great America in Gurnee, Illinois, USA.

The Gulf Coaster opened in 1976, along with a similar coaster at California's Great America (at the time both parks were owned by the Marriott company).
